intro: Global technology, cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, cloud services, and healthcare sectors have been the primary focus of recent activity under the ai-security tag, with 44 articles published between April 12 and April 23, 2026. The threat actor OpenClaw was observed, alongside critical vulnerabilities CVE-2026-5760 and CVE-2026-5752, carrying CVSS scores of 9.8 and 9.3 respectively. The coverage includes 20 high-severity and 6 critical incidents, with 12 informational and 5 medium reports, reflecting a broad global impact across all affected regions.
